message:
fix(runtime): make region heap alloc transactional w.r.t. stats

Move len/stats/GLOBAL_ALLOC_COUNT updates to after slot insertion
succeeds.  Previously, a panic on a corrupted free-list head
(unreachable! replaced with panic!) would leave stats incremented
but no slot actually occupied, violating the invariant that
stats.live == count of Occupied slots.

Also boxes the value into a trait object before the slot-reuse
branch to share the allocation path and avoid constructing a
full HeapEntry struct that is immediately destructured.

Adds alloc_panic_does_not_mutate_len_or_stats test that sets
free_head to an out-of-bounds index, catches the panic, and
verifies all stat fields remain unchanged.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
